task_completion.description: Open QBlade and load the NREL 5MW sample project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QBlade application window is open, and the NREL 5MW turbine project is visible in the project/object explorer or main workspace.

task_completion.description: Set up a steady-state BEM simulation with a TSR sweep from 1 to 15.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation setup dialog or module in QBlade showing the Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) range configured from a minimum of 1 to a maximum of 15.

task_completion.description: Run the BEM simulation to generate the Cp vs TSR curve.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A plotted graph within the QBlade interface showing Power Coefficient (Cp) on the Y-axis and Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) on the X-axis, with a visible curve peaking around TSR 7.5.

task_completion.description: Export the Cp vs TSR simulation results to nrel5mw_bem_results.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor showing the file 'nrel5mw_bem_results.txt' in the /home/ga/Documents/projects/ directory, containing tabular simulation data.

task_completion.description: Create a text report documenting the optimal TSR, max Cp value, and an interpretation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'nrel5mw_report.txt' containing the optimal TSR value, the maximum Cp value, and at least one sentence interpreting these results.

integrity.description: The agent used the QBlade GUI to perform the simulation rather than bypassing it with scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the QBlade graphical interface (menus, dialogs, plots) rather than just terminal commands or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The exported results file appears to be genuinely generated by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'nrel5mw_bem_results.txt' file contains structured, tabular data typical of a software export, rather than manually typed mock data.

integrity.description: The values in the text report match the simulation results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The optimal TSR and max Cp values written in 'nrel5mw_report.txt' correspond to the peak of the curve shown in the QBlade plot and the exported data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The NREL 5MW reference turbine has a verified optimal Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) of approximately 7.55-7.82 and a maximum Power Coefficient (Cp) of 0.482-0.486. The theoretical maximum Cp (Betz limit) is 0.593. Verify that the agent's reported values fall within the expected ranges (TSR: 5-12, Cp: 0.3-0.55) and accurately reflect the peak of the generated QBlade curve.
